fields.Name: Aptify
fields.Description: Aptify (Community Brands / Momentive Software) Web Services API connector. Provides full CRUD over the standard association management entities — Persons, Companies, Memberships, Events, Orders, Committees, and supporting reference data — via the Aptif...

fields.Name: Persons
fields.Description: Individual contact / member records — Aptify's primary identity entity. Persons own Memberships, EventRegistrations, Orders, Donations, and most other relationships.

fields.Name: Email
fields.Description: Primary email — useful as a natural key for upsert.

fields.Name: Companies
fields.Description: Organization records — employers, member orgs, vendors, sponsors.

fields.Name: Memberships
fields.Description: Membership records linking Persons (or Companies) to MembershipTypes with start/end dates and status.

fields.Name: MembershipTypes
fields.Description: Reference data — definitions of membership categories (Individual, Corporate, Student, Lifetime, etc.).

fields.Name: Events
fields.Description: Events, meetings, conferences. Parents of EventRegistrations.

fields.Name: OrderDetails
fields.Description: Order line items linking Products to Orders with quantity and pricing.

fields.Name: Products
fields.Description: Sellable products / SKUs (publications, dues line items, event registrations, etc.).

fields.Name: CommitteeMembers
fields.Description: Person assignments to Committees, including role and term dates.

fields.Name: Addresses
fields.Description: Postal addresses linked to Persons or Companies.

fields.Name: Donations
fields.Description: Donation and gift records (campaigns, pledges, contributions).

fields.Name: Education
fields.Description: Education / degree records for Persons (institution, degree, year).

fields.Name: Payments
fields.Description: Payment transactions against Orders / Invoices (cash, card, ACH).
